name: add_module_instance
short_description: Add CIPS instance in top module
full_help:
add_module_instance

Description: 
Add CIPS instance in top module

Syntax: 
add_module_instance  -module_name <arg> -inst_name <arg> [-lib_name <arg>]
                     [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<file>]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  -module_name  Primary unit name to be instantiated
  -inst_name    Intance name of module/entity to be instantiated
  [-lib_name]   Library name in which module_name is compiled
  [-force]      Overwrite existing file
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]      Output file to write. Update top file, If option not provided

Categories: 
FileIO
